title: milla valliflora
intro: Milla valliflora, also known as the purple coral bells or purple coral, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asphodelaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Milla valliflora include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Milla valliflora is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can be used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
